10537159.title: Doctor Who
10537159.description: Intelligence agents around the world are under attack from alien forces, so MI6 turn to the only people who can help: the Doctor and friends. As they travel the globe looking for answers, attacks come from all sides. Earth's security rests on the team's shoulders, but where will this planet-threatening conspiracy lead them?

10538147.title: Bad Move
10538147.description: Nicky and Steve are missing the city, and fantasise about all the exciting things they could be doing before both experience a bizarre and unusual day.

10538240.title: Bad Move
10538240.description: Nicky and Steve decide to put a brave face on things and invite all their old friends from Leeds for a long-overdue housewarming party.

10539104.title: Ordinary Lies
10539104.description: Fletch and wife Caz are the rock-solid office couple. However, when Caz oversteps the mark sending Fletch on a downward spiral, he wonders if she really is the right woman for him.

10539280.title: Keeping Up Appearances
10539280.description: Richard is not exactly over the moon with his birthday present, but that is only the start of a series of problems.

10540235.title: Casualty
10540235.description: Fenisha's life is thrown into disarray when a familiar face from her past appears. Rash fights to prove his competence, and Marty goes the extra mile to support women's issues.

10541181.title: Impossible
10541181.description: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

10542099.title: Shakespeare and Hathaway: Private Investigators
10542099.description: Frank and Lu investigate death threats made against a former soap star who's about to stage her return to the limelight.

10542283.title: Bad Move
10542283.description: Nicky and Steve decide to put a brave face on things and invite all their old friends from Leeds for a long-overdue housewarming party.

10604843.title: Keeping Up Appearances
10604843.description: Richard is not exactly over the moon with his birthday present, but that is only the start of a series of problems.

10604964.title: The Great British Sewing Bee
10604964.description: The show reaches its climax as the three finalists enter the sewing room for the very last time. The sewing experts must decide who will take the title of Britain's best amateur sewer as they set three tough `couture' themed challenges.

10605436.title: Shakespeare and Hathaway: Private Investigators
10605436.description: Frank and Lu investigate death threats made against a former soap star who's about to stage her return to the limelight.

10605890.title: Bargain Hunt
10605890.description: At the Hemswell Antiques Centre in Lincolnshire, a father and daughter take on a mother and daughter to buy three items that will hopefully make a profit at auction, and they all have their sights set on a golden gavel. One team falls in love with a handmade dolls house while the other team sets sights on a pair of Edwardian glass eyes. Also, Anita travels to Sheffield, famous for its cutlery industry, to uncover the story of some pioneering women: the infamous Buffer Girls.

10606540.title: Casualty
10606540.description: Fenisha's life is thrown into disarray when a familiar face from her past appears. Rash fights to prove his competence, and Marty goes the extra mile to support women's issues.

10606654.title: Call the Midwife
10606654.description: With modern advances starting to change things for the better, even medical professionals like Dr Turner and Shelagh are forced to consider their own lifestyles. As they fight for better respiratory health for their patients, Timothy realises the risks his parents are running themselves by continuing to smoke.

10607123.title: Call the Midwife
10607123.description: A spate of violent attacks on women brings a state of fear to Poplar, and impacts directly on the residents of Nonnatus House. A secret pregnancy threatens the life of a young girl after her mother takes matters into her own hands. Meanwhile, a long overdue holiday for the Turner family fails to live up to expectations.

10607567.title: Doctors
10607567.description: Al reluctantly leads a shared patient consultation, and Bear may be out of his depth. A radio host, a graphic novelist and a timid man have something in common.

10607698.title: Doctors
10607698.description: Valerie sees omens everywhere, and Bear can't see what's in front of him. Zara has to step in when a one-night stand has disastrous consequences.

10608041.title: Doctors
10608041.description: A dog's death leads Rob to uncover a dark secret. Meanwhile, flirting is in the air, Daniel is flattered, but Bear is horrified.

10608143.title: Doctors
10608143.description: It's the day of the charity car wash. Luca, Ruhma and Karen have to go the extra mile for their customers.

10608246.title: The Great British Sewing Bee
10608246.description: The show reaches its climax as the three finalists enter the sewing room for the very last time. The sewing experts must decide who will take the title of Britain's best amateur sewer as they set three tough `couture' themed challenges.

10608681.title: EastEnders
10608681.description: Callum's attempt to prove himself ends in ruin, Ruby goes head to head with Lily, and Rainie and Vi clash as Phil makes Kat an unexpected offer.

10609014.title: EastEnders
10609014.description: Callum can't open up to Ben, Kat comes up with a business idea, and Vi meddles in the Highway marriage.

10609112.title: EastEnders
10609112.description: Lola is worried when Isaac tells a lie, Callum confides in the wrong person, Bernie starts to feel the pressure, and Linda knows that the truth will soon be out.

10609184.title: EastEnders
10609184.description: Jack has bad news for Stuart and Rainie. Bobby impresses Dana with Zack's help, Isaac's suspicion firmly takes hold, and Callum digs himself deeper as Ben makes a discovery.

10609259.title: Casualty
10609259.description: Fenisha's life is thrown into disarray when a familiar face from her past appears. Rash fights to prove his competence, and Marty goes the extra mile to support women's issues.

10609674.title: Impossible
10609674.description: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

10610104.title: Impossible
10610104.description: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

10610557.title: Antiques Roadshow
10610557.description: Fiona Bruce and the experts welcome thousands of visitors to Erddig in north Wales, the home of the Yorke family. Treasures turning up include a mourning ring connected to Charlotte Bronte and a Welsh love spoon handed down through the generations.

10611053.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
10611053.description: In Torquay, the team and local kind volunteers step up to help single dad Stuart, who has suffered with progressive multiple sclerosis since his now 15-year-old daughter Lauren was born. His primary carer is his mum, Grandma Lin, who is blind.
10611053.category: Home & Garden, Doe-het-zelf, Bouwen en verbouwen, Kunstnijverheid

10611234.title: Doctor Who
10611234.description: A terrifying plan to destroy humanity is about to reach fruition. The Doctor and her friends must escape multiple traps and defeat a deadly alliance.

10611848.title: Ghosts
10611848.description: Fortune smiles on a cash-strapped Mike and Alison when a TV company comes calling looking for an old house in which to film their period drama. To get the money in the bank, Alison must ensure the shoot goes without a hitch.

10611953.title: This Time with Alan Partridge
10611953.description: Faced with some of the toughest challenges that live television can throw at a man: rancour behind the scenes, a viewer in danger, and a segment on ladies' fashion, Alan calls on `Sidekick' Simon Denton to step up to the plate.

10612337.title: Josh
10612337.description: Josh and Owen have tickets to the darts, but can't afford to get drunk in preparation - which is a bit like going to war without a gun, only more dangerous. Fortunately, Owen's cousin is getting married, so they head to the wedding in anticipation of some free afternoon drinking. What could possibly go wrong?

10612432.title: Friday Night Dinner
10612432.description: Mum's friend Val moves in and causes havoc when she finds that Dad is hiding a tin of 20-year-old meat in his shed.

10612516.title: Still Open All Hours
10612516.description: Granville has a large quantity of bargain spectacles to sell. Meanwhile, encouraged by reading a self-help book, Mr Newbold decides to tell Mrs Featherstone how he really feels about their relationship, Eric tries to persuade Kath to go on a camping holiday and what is in the large, heavy box that has arrived for Leroy?
